title: AI displacement risk and corporate credit spreads
description: A firm-level test of whether AI workforce-displacement exposure is priced in corporate bond Z-spreads for 344 issuers from 2015 to 2026. The result is a clean, well-identified null: point estimates are right-signed (more exposure, wider spreads) but only the rating-controlled cross-section is marginally significant, and the pre-trend is flat.
